summary: bvm-core contacts hardcoded external endpoint with host reconnaissance at install/require time
details: dist/index.js contains code that imports child_process and issues fetch() calls to a hardcoded non-registry host at https://bvm-core.nexsail.top, alongside references to host/id collection primitives. The destination is not an official npm registry endpoint and does not correspond to any documented purpose for a package of this name; the request is unconditionally directed to an attacker-controlled domain. This composition (child_process import + hardcoded remote domain + fetch calls carrying host identifiers) is the shape of an install/require-time beacon that transmits installer-side data to an external server under the author's control.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
